raw_text:
Sentinel Dynamics // Principal Security Engineer

San Francisco, CA (Remote-friendly) | Full-time | $280,000 - $380,000 USD annually, plus equity
(0.5-1.2%) and performance bonus

Enterprise security intelligence for the cloud-first era

>> ABOUT

Sentinel Dynamics is a Series C security infrastructure company focused on building next-
generation detection and response platforms for enterprises managing distributed cloud

environments. We help Fortune 500 companies prevent breaches through intelligent threat
modeling, real-time detection, and automated incident response across AWS, Azure, and on-

premises infrastructure.

>> SUMMARY

We are seeking a Principal Security Engineer with 12+ years of experience to lead our

organization-wide security architecture and strategy. You will define technical security
standards, mentor a team of senior engineers, drive adoption of threat modeling and

secure SDLC practices across all product teams, and make high-impact decisions on our
detection and response infrastructure. This role reports directly to the VP of Security

and shapes the technical direction of our entire security platform.

>> RESPONSIBILITIES

- Define and evolve organization-wide security architecture strategy, including cloud

security posture, identity & access management (IAM), and threat detection frameworks
across AWS environments

- Lead threat modeling and OWASP Top 10 remediation efforts across engineering teams,
establishing secure coding standards and architectural review processes

- Drive adoption and tuning of our SIEM/XDR platform (Splunk/Elasticsearch-based),
designing detection rules and response playbooks for enterprise-scale threat detection

- Architect and oversee penetration testing programs, coordinating with third-party
assessors and translating findings into concrete remediation strategies and technology

investments
- Mentor and develop 5-7 senior security engineers, providing technical guidance on

AppSec, cloud infrastructure hardening, and vulnerability management programs
- Establish and maintain Python-based security automation frameworks for threat

intelligence ingestion, API security scanning, and incident response workflows
- Partner with infrastructure and product teams to implement defense-in-depth

strategies, including AWS IAM policies, secrets management, and zero-trust network
architecture

- Lead quarterly security architecture reviews with C-suite and board, presenting risk
assessments, emerging threats, and technology roadmap recommendations

- Direct strategic security technology investments (tools, platforms, training),
evaluating solutions for SIEM, cloud security posture management (CSPM), and runtime

protection

>> MUST HAVE

- 12+ years of security engineering experience, with at least 5 years in a principal,

staff, or lead architect role defining security strategy across organizations
- Deep expertise in cloud security, particularly AWS IAM, identity federation, and

architectural hardening in multi-account environments

 - Proven experience designing and implementing SIEM/threat detection platforms;

familiarity with Splunk, Elasticsearch, or similar tools and query languages (SPL,
KQL)

- Expert-level knowledge of OWASP Top 10, secure SDLC practices, threat modeling
frameworks (STRIDE, PASTA), and AppSec program development

- Strong penetration testing background or ability to lead and evaluate third-party
assessments; understanding of attack vectors, exploitation techniques, and remediation

- Demonstrable Python expertise for security automation, API development, and
infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, CloudFormation) for security controls

- Experience mentoring senior engineers and shaping technical culture; proven ability
to influence across organizational boundaries without direct authority

>> NICE TO HAVE

- Background in incident response or SOC management with hands-on experience triaging
security events and building detection logic

- Hands-on penetration testing certification (OSCP, CEH) or equivalent demonstrated
offensive security skills

- Open-source security project contributions (e.g., OWASP projects, threat
intelligence platforms) or published research

- Experience with GitOps and continuous security scanning in CI/CD pipelines;
knowledge of supply chain security practices

>> STACK

AWS IAM / Identity Services / OWASP Security Standards / Threat Modeling (STRIDE/PASTA) / Splunk

or ELK Stack (SIEM/XDR) / Python (security automation, data analysis) / Penetration Testing

Frameworks (Metasploit, Burp Suite) / AppSec Scanning Tools (SonarQube, Checkmarx, or similar

SAST) / Terraform / Infrastructure-as-Code / Cloud Security Posture Management (AWS Security
Hub, CloudTrail) / Incident Response Orchestration Platforms

>> BENEFITS

- Competitive equity package (0.5-1.2% of preferred shares) with potential significant
upside in Series C funding stage

- Comprehensive health insurance: medical, dental, vision with 100% premium coverage
for employee and 80% for dependents

- Unlimited PTO with a minimum of 20 recommended days annually, plus 10 company
holidays and 4 weeks parental leave

- Annual learning and development budget of $5,000 per employee for conferences,
certifications (OSCP, CEH, CISSP), and training courses

- Remote-friendly work environment with flexible hours; optional access to secure
office space in San Francisco

- Annual security consulting budget and professional development pathways for
executive leadership (MBA, executive education)

>> APPLY

Apply directly through our careers page at sentinel-dynamics.com/careers or send your
resume, cover letter, and a brief summary of a major security architecture decision

you've led to careers@sentinel-dynamics.com. Security-focused candidates should feel free
to encrypt submissions using our PGP key (available on the careers page). Candidates

selected for initial screening will participate in a technical architecture discussion
and reference calls with previous mentees or colleagues.
